rationale: Proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Elec. Code §253.039, which governs political contributions in the Capitol or courthouses. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A person may not knowingly make or authorize a political contribution while in the Capitol or a courthouse to:
_note: No statutory or operational connection between property tax homestead exemption amounts and restrictions on political contributions in public buildings.
